key_findings: Data quantity dominates architecture sophistication — baseline already near-optimal with 2082 training samples
Dead feature zeroing (n_tabs, tab_width) accepted 3/3 runs — most robust finding across all runs
Bruggeman tortuosity feature rejected — MLP learns it implicitly with sufficient data
Target normalization rejected — unnecessary with enough data to resolve scale differences
GELU activation + HIDDEN=96 only accepted improvements — minimal architecture changes needed
Ensemble, BatchNorm, skip connections, 3-layer MLP all rejected — no overfitting to fix
Baseline score (0.2958) already beats Run 002 best (0.4676) by 37% — data > architecture
